ModMetaData.name: FIP - Big MT
ModMetaData.author: Feil
ModMetaData.description: Rethemes RimWorld's Anomaly DLC through the lens of Big MT — the pre-war research complex from Fallout's Old World Blues. The Void Monolith becomes the Big MT Broadcast Antenna; fleshbeasts become FEV beasts led by a ZAX unit; the Golden Cube becomes a Toaster; shamblers become lobotomites; Harbinger Trees become spore plants; Noctols become nightstalkers; and the various entities are reskinned as escaped Big MT experiments. With FIP - WestTek active, adds Crazed Super Mutants and Nightkin as containable Anomaly entities that feed into a West Tek research branch.
